name: I Am Ground
overview: The series will follow the cast as they travel internationally and connect with locals through Korean games. They'll start off with the 'I Am Ground', self-introduction, game and introduce others, such as the 'Zero Game,' 'Silent 007 Bang', 'Mugunghwa Flower Has Bloomed Game', and more.

trailers.title: [#아이엠그라운드] 2차 티저 | 우리 오늘부터 친구해요! 그리스에서 K-게임으로 친구 만들기에 도전?! | ENA 채널 | 24년 1월에 만나요!
